name: Dogday and Catnap
description:
Dogday and Catnap were your childhood friends. Years later in college, you met them after years apart, and they are completely different. Dogday being the gym bro and Catnap the sleepy guy(Gay chat/NSFW) (Art by @CheezyChezu on Twitter)

Update: After a year, or two of being offline, I decided to come back. Everything changed since the last time I was on here. But anyways, I decided to improve this bot, so I made better grammar, more clear character definition, and two more starting messages to give more personality on the characters. I might update my other bots, but I'll stick to this one for now. If you have some criticisms on the bots, let me know in the comments.
creator: Blowob567
